heading: Health care fraud
label: 1347 Health care fraud
notes: Amendments2010— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 111–148
amendments: Amendments2010— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 111–148

children.text: to defraud any health care benefit program; or
to obtain, by means of false or fraudulent pretenses, representations, or promises, any of the money or property owned by, or under the custody or control of, any health care benefit program,

children.label: b
children.text: With respect to violations of this section, a person need not have actual knowledge of this section or specific intent to commit a violation of this section.
